headline_en: The anniversary of the event in Ulukale village
summary_tr: 1994'te Ulukale köyünde yaşanan ve basında yer bulan olayın yıl dönümüne dair haber.
summary_en: News on the anniversary of the event that took place in Ulukale village in 1994 and was covered in the press.
summary_ar: خبرٌ في ذكرى الحدث الذي وقع في قرية أولوكالة عام 1994 ونالته التغطية الصحفية.
